overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the Vista Del Rey district of Night City during golden hour. The player navigates through neon-lit commercial streets, stops at a traffic intersection for pedestrians, and continues driving beneath elevated highways with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: vehicle makes a right turn at the intersection with yellow crosswalk markings
passing under the elevated concrete highway structure into a shaded area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit downtown district, executing a right turn while passing under elevated transit lines

entered.detail: tall structures covered in glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements
futuristic monorail tracks running overhead with green and yellow support columns
massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the roadway
vertical neon signs and digital displays attached to commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a dense cyberpunk commercial district with vibrant neon signage covering the buildings. The camera turns right at an intersection and passes beneath a massive elevated highway structure, transitioning from open sky to shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban boulevard with palm trees and modern high-rises

events.description: exiting the shaded underpass into bright morning sunlight with clear blue sky
approaching red traffic light and slowing to a stop behind other vehicles

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the sunlit boulevard lined with palm trees, approaching a busy intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the sidewalk in the golden morning light
futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distance
ground floor commercial establishments with awnings and signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into bright morning sunlight, the scene opens onto a wide boulevard lined with palm trees. The vehicle drives toward a distant cluster of modern skyscrapers while approaching a traffic intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and traffic signals

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop at the red traffic light
pedestrians begin crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicle
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light, observing pedestrians crossing the wide intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing from left to right across the yellow-striped crosswalk

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow zebra stripes across the asphalt
futuristic high-rise buildings forming the city skyline in the background

segments.scene_description: The vehicle waits at a red light at a busy intersection as pedestrians cross in front. The morning sun illuminates the distant skyscrapers while the traffic signal hangs overhead, eventually changing to green after a fifteen-second wait.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor beneath elevated highway with massive digital billboards

events.description: accelerating through the intersection as the light turns green
entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway with overhead digital displays

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection and driving beneath the elevated highway with large digital billboards overhead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel and slightly ahead on the right side

entered.detail: massive curved digital screens displaying advertisements including 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH' text
elevated highway overhead creating a covered corridor effect with structural supports
ground level store signs including illuminated 'softsys' neon sign

segments.scene_description: As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection and enters a covered corridor beneath the elevated highway. Massive digital billboards displaying advertisements span the roadway overhead, while other vehicles drive alongside in the multi-lane street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a dense cyberpunk commercial district that transitions from shadowed underpasses to sun-drenched boulevards and back into a neon-lit corridor. It begins by weaving through vibrant neon signage before turning right at an intersection and passing beneath a massive elevated highway, shifting the lighting from open sky to deep shadow. As the vehicle emerges from the underpass, the scene opens into bright morning sunlight on a wide boulevard lined with palm trees and distant skyscrapers. The camera then comes to a halt at a busy intersection to wait for pedestrians to cross under the glow of the morning sun before accelerating forward as the light turns green. Finally, the vehicle enters a covered corridor beneath the highway, where the environment shifts once more as massive digital billboards span the roadway overhead.
